query:
ALTER TABLE fin_transactions 
  ADD COLUMN needsApproval BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN approvalStatus ENUM('none', 'pending_approval', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'none',
  ADD COLUMN approvedBy VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN approvedAt BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN createdByName VARCHAR(255);
